topic: Haaland Mbappe World Cup Goals Race

current.headline: Mbappe v Haaland: Who is more important for their country?
current.summary: Two of the biggest forwards in the tournament are being judged on the same knockout slate, with France and Kylian Mbappe set against Norway and Erling Haaland in a goals race that could swing this market quickly.

items.headline: Official: Thuram out of France squad for World Cup Round of 32 clash
items.summary: France go into their knockout preparations without Marcus Thuram, a squad update that sharpens the focus on how much attacking burden falls on Mbappe in the market's France leg.

items.headline: Norway’s Erling Haaland punishes Iraq with double on World Cup debut
items.summary: Haaland's early-tournament finishing burst remains the clearest recent form marker for Norway and provides the natural counterweight to France's Mbappe storyline in this matchup market.
